# Pixlgrove

> Pixlgrove is a web design and development studio that builds pixel-perfect, fast, conversion-focused websites for businesses worldwide. Work is delivered in days to a few weeks. Every project is quoted individually based on scope.

## What we do

- **Website design** — custom UI/UX built around your brand (not templates), mobile-first, Figma files included, unlimited revisions.
- **Web development** — hand-coded or CMS-powered (HTML/CSS, React, Next.js, WordPress, Webflow, Sanity), e-commerce (Shopify, WooCommerce), performance-optimised and SEO-ready.
- **Ongoing support** — content updates, performance monitoring, security updates, new features, priority response within 24 hours.

## Pricing

- Pricing is quoted per project based on scope. Get in touch and we'll send a tailored, no-obligation quote — usually within 24 hours.

## Contact

- Email: hello@pixlgrove.com
- Start a project: https://pixlgrove.com/contact.html
